description.ko: 빛이 유리 매질을 통해 근본적인 색상으로 분해되는 광학 물리 현상을 예술적으로 표현하여, 명료함과 다각적인 관점을 상징합니다.
description.en: An artistic representation of optical physics where light breaks into its fundamental colors through a glass medium, symbolizing clarity and multifaceted perspectives.

prompt: A macro cinematic shot of a multi-faceted crystal prism refracting a beam of white light into a brilliant spectral rainbow. Soft caustic patterns dance across a neutral grey surface, sharp focus on the internal light reflections, iridescent flares, 8k resolution, minimalist aesthetic, ethereal atmosphere.
